# New Hire Onboarding (Fixture)

## Overview

Checklist-style **onboarding** doc for HR tests (small and fast to load).

---

## Before Day 1

- employment paperwork in HR system
- laptop and access requests submitted
- manager assigned

---

## First Week

- complete security training
- set up email and SSO
- read code of conduct and PTO policy pointers

---

## IT Access

Request standard groups: email, chat, VPN (if applicable). Escalate via IT ticket.

---

## HR Contacts

Use the internal HR portal for benefits and payroll questions.

---

Last updated: fixture
